root.rep_text: รายงานสัญญาเงินกู้อนุมัติแล้ว เรียงตามคำขอกู้

begining_of_contract.text: ตั้งแต่วันนี้

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code, sc_lon_m_contract.approve_date, sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status, sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.branch_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date, sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no, sc_com_m_branch.branch_name, (case sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status when '0' then 'ไม่จ่าย' when '1' then 'จ่ายแล้ว' else 'รอจ่าย' end)as rec_rep_status_1 FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_com_m_branch, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no /* and ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between :adt_date1 and :adt_date2 )*/ /* AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = :as_loantype )*/ /* AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = :as_recrep )*/ /* AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.branch_id in (:as_branch_id)*/ /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
